C:\Users\sanchitsikri\Downloads\winlibs-x86_64-mcf-seh-gcc-14.1.0-mingw-w64ucrt-11.0.1-r1\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\peer.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\sanchitsikri\Downloads\winlibs-x86_64-mcf-seh-gcc-14.1.0-mingw-w64ucrt-11.0.1-r1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\peer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\peer.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\sanchitsikri\Downloads\winlibs-x86_64-mcf-seh-gcc-14.1.0-mingw-w64ucrt-11.0.1-r1\mingw64\bin\c++.exe  -std=c++17 -pthread  -pthread -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\peer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o peer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libpeer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\peer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
